Description: Employees must report to work on time and record attendance daily
Employees are entitled to 24 days of paid annual leave
Employees may avail sick leave upon informing their manager
Employees receive 12 casual leave days annually
Employees must maintain professional conduct at work
Eligible employees may work remotely up to three days weekly
Passwords must be changed every 90 days
Personal and company data must be handled securely
Recruitment must follow equal opportunity guidelines
All selected candidates undergo background verification
Salary reviews occur annually based on performance
Employees receive company-sponsored health insurance
Life insurance coverage is provided to eligible employees
Travel expenses must follow approved reimbursement guidelines
Valid business expenses are reimbursed within 30 days
Employees are encouraged to complete annual training
Performance reviews are conducted twice a year
Promotions are based on merit and business needs
Employment decisions are free from discrimination
Harassment of any kind is prohibited
Employees must disclose potential conflicts of interest
Employees must follow limits on gifts and hospitality
Company devices must be used for authorized purposes
Company email should be used professionally
Internet access should support business activities
Sensitive documents should not be left unattended
Employees must comply with workplace safety rules
Employees must follow evacuation procedures during emergencies
Eligible employees receive maternity leave benefits
Eligible employees receive paternity leave benefits
Leave is available for eligible adoptive parents
Employees may take leave after the loss of a family member
Overtime must receive prior approval
Flexible schedules require manager approval
Employees are responsible for company-issued assets
Employees must complete clearance before leaving
Employees must serve the required notice period
Employees can report misconduct confidentially
Bribery and corruption are strictly prohibited
Employee personal information is protected
Confidential counseling services are available
The organization promotes mental well-being
International travel requires executive approval
Employees should maintain appropriate workplace attire
Employees should avoid sharing confidential company information online
Only authorized spokespeople may interact with the media
Employees must complete mandatory compliance courses
New employees complete a six-month probation period
Outstanding performance is recognized through formal programs
Employee records are retained according to legal requirements
